questions: How do I buy a franchise?
answers: A franchise is a business model where you pay a fee to use an established company's brand, systems, and support to run your own location of their business.
Franchise holo ekta business model ja te tumi ekta established company er brand ar system use kore nijjer outlet chalate paro, fee diye.
To buy a franchise, research different franchise opportunities, review the Franchise Disclosure Document (FDD), secure financing, and sign the franchise agreement.
Franchising can be a good investment because you get a proven business model, brand recognition, and ongoing support. However, initial costs are high and you have less creative freedom.
